metadata.title: 2026 Wholesale Jan-Dec Data Reference
notes: Dates are stored as ISO strings using YYYY-MM-DD.
Document numbers are stored as strings to preserve leading zeroes.
Blank/template rows were excluded during extraction.
JUL to DEC currently have zero extracted transaction rows in the requested sections.
Amounts are JSON numbers rounded to 6 decimal places to avoid spreadsheet floating artifacts.

source_row.description: Original row number from monthly sheet.

document_no_label.source_label: CHSI No. / CASI No. / DR No.

document_no.source_label: CHSI No. / CASI No. / DR No.
document_no.description: Kept as string to preserve leading zeroes.
